title: Enforce experiment-tracking discipline
description: Log every training run with params, metrics, artifacts, and environment so experiments are comparable and the best run is recoverable.
body: Use when running many training experiments to find a deployable model. Do not track results in ad-hoc notebooks or spreadsheets — runs become uncomparable and the winning config gets lost. Actions: log params, metrics, artifacts, code commit, and dependency versions to a tracking server per run; verify the leaderboard can rank runs and re-open any run's artifacts. Validation signals include a tracking dashboard comparing runs on a shared metric and a recovered best-run config. Risk boundary: an untracked best model cannot be reproduced or audited; if a promoted model lacks a tracked run, deny promotion and escalate.
